summary: Completed comprehensive backend testing of BIBI Cars CRM P2 implementation: Telegram Alerts, Advanced Analytics, and Risk/Abuse Control. All P1 modules still working correctly.
passed_tests: All P1 modules working: Payments (4 packages), Contracts, Shipping, Ringostat calls, Tasks (1 active rule)
Analytics module: Daily summary, Owner analytics, Conversion funnel - all endpoints responding
Alerts module: Statistics, Logs, Settings update, Telegram linking - all functional
Risk Control module: User risk assessment, Manager risk assessment, Daily risk check - all working
Telegram Bot API connection verified: @Bibicars_bot connected and responding
All 27 backend API endpoints tested successfully
